export.enc: <wddxPacket version='1.0'><header/><data><recordset rowCount='2' fieldNames='EIID,EICODIGO,EIMODULO,ECODIGO,EIDESCRIPCION,EIDELIMITADOR,EIMOD_LOGIN,EIMOD_FECHA,EIMOD_USUCODIGO,EIMOD_ULOCALIZACION,EIUSATEMP,EITAMBUFFER,EIPARCIAL,EIVERIFICAANT,EIEXPORTA,EIIMPORTA,EICFIMPORTA,EICFEXPORTA,EICFPARAM' type='coldfusion.sql.QueryTable'><field name='EIID'><number>2180.0</number><number>2181.0</number></field><field name='EICODIGO'><string>BVALDESPE </string><string>PBANCOMER </string></field><field name='EIMODULO'><string>rh.reppag </string><string>rh.reppag </string></field><field name='ECODIGO'><null/><null/></field><field name='EIDESCRIPCION'><string>Exportador Vales de Despensa</string><string>Exportar Pagos Bancomer</string></field><field name='EIDELIMITADOR'><string>C</string><string>C</string></field><field name='EIMOD_LOGIN'><string>pso</string><string>pso</string></field><field name='EIMOD_FECHA'><dateTime>2011-5-27T16:31:44-6:0</dateTime><dateTime>2011-5-27T16:14:3-6:0</dateTime></field><field name='EIMOD_USUCODIGO'><number>1.0</number><number>1.0</number></field><field name='EIMOD_ULOCALIZACION'><string>00</string><string>00</string></field><field name='EIUSATEMP'><boolean value='false'/><boolean value='false'/></field><field name='EITAMBUFFER'><number>0.0</number><number>0.0</number></field><field name='EIPARCIAL'><boolean value='false'/><boolean value='false'/></field><field name='EIVERIFICAANT'><number>0.0</number><number>0.0</number></field><field name='EIEXPORTA'><boolean value='true'/><boolean value='true'/></field><field name='EIIMPORTA'><boolean value='false'/><boolean value='false'/></field><field name='EICFIMPORTA'><string> </string><string> </string></field><field name='EICFEXPORTA'><string>/rh/importar/exportarValesDespensa.cfm</string><string>/rh/importar/exportarPagosBancomer.cfm</string></field><field name='EICFPARAM'><string> </string><string> </string></field></recordset></data></wddxPacket>
export.det: <wddxPacket version='1.0'><header/><data><recordset rowCount='6' fieldNames='EIID,DINUMERO,DINOMBRE,DIDESCRIPCION,DITIPO,DILONGITUD' type='coldfusion.sql.QueryTable'><field name='EIID'><number>2180.0</number><number>2180.0</number><number>2180.0</number><number>2181.0</number><number>2181.0</number><number>2181.0</number></field><field name='DINUMERO'><number>-2.0</number><number>-1.0</number><number>1.0</number><number>-2.0</number><number>-1.0</number><number>1.0</number></field><field name='DINOMBRE'><string>Bid</string><string>ERNid</string><string>salida</string><string>Bid</string><string>ERNid</string><string>salida</string></field><field name='DIDESCRIPCION'><string>Id del Banco</string><string>Id Nomina</string><string>Salida unica con extension de 108 caract</string><string>Id del Banco</string><string>id de la Nomina</string><string>Linea de salida con el resultado</string></field><field name='DITIPO'><string>int</string><string>int</string><string>varchar</string><string>int</string><string>int</string><string>varchar</string></field><field name='DILONGITUD'><number>0.0</number><number>0.0</number><number>108.0</number><number>0.0</number><number>0.0</number><number>108.0</number></field></recordset></data></wddxPacket>
